task_completion.description: Crawl the target website using Screaming Frog SEO Spider
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI is open and shows a completed or in-progress crawl of 'https://books.toscrape.com/'.

task_completion.description: Export 'All Inlinks' data to the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor shows a CSV file saved in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: The exported CSV contains anchor text data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the exported CSV file are visible and include an 'Anchor Text' (or 'Anchor') column header with rows of link data.

task_completion.description: Create the anchor text report file in the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file named 'anchor_text_report.txt' is visible in the '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: The report includes the required quantitative metrics
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'anchor_text_report.txt' explicitly state the total number of links analyzed, as well as the counts of links with empty and/generic anchor text.

task_completion.description: The report includes at least 2 specific recommendations for improvement
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'anchor_text_report.txt' list at least two distinct, actionable recommendations based on the anchor text analysis.

integrity.description: Agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Screaming Frog SEO Spider application interface being used, rather than terminal commands (like curl or wget) or Python scraping scripts.

integrity.description: The CSV file is a genuine export from Screaming Frog
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file should look like a standard Screaming Frog 'All Inlinks' export (containing multiple standard columns like Type, Source, Destination, Anchor Text, Status Code), not a manually typed or mocked file with only a few columns.

integrity.description: The report metrics appear to be derived from actual analysis rather than placeholders
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the report (total links, empty/generic counts) should look like specific, calculated integers derived from the CSV, rather than generic placeholder text like '[Insert Total Here]'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is https://books.toscrape.com/ (domain: books.toscrape.com). Screaming Frog SEO Spider's 'All Inlinks' export includes an 'Anchor Text' column containing anchor data for exported links.
